name: PressPilot — Keyword Scoring

nodes.name: Fetch Pending Keywords
nodes.notes: Fetches pending keywords from NocoDB. Switch to Google Sheets HTTP node if using Sheets.

body.systemPrompt: You are an SEO strategist. Score keywords objectively. Return only valid JSON, no markdown.

nodes.name: Trigger Research & Draft
nodes.notes: Triggers the research-draft workflow for each selected keyword.

notes: Runs daily at 6AM Asia/Dhaka. Scores pending keywords, picks top 3, marks them selected, triggers research-draft workflow. Uses NocoDB by default — swap the HTTP nodes for Google Sheets nodes if using Sheets.
